title: Classic and Modern formats
summaryHTML:
Classic uses a USUM-style base with Level 100 play, EVs/IVs, standard PP, Champions ability/move/status mechanics, and legacy NatDex movesets without PLA or Z-A additions.

Modern uses a Champions base with Level 50 play, Stat Points, 31 IV lock, Champions ability/move/status mechanics, 8/12/16/20 PP, and PLA/Z-A move additions legalised.
author: Rasche

title: OU banlist update
summaryHTML:
OU banlist update: Natdex Champions Classic OU and Modern OU have received an updated banlist for several Pokemon, Mega Stones, and luck-based items.

Darkrai, Walking Wake, Deoxys-Speed, Urshifu-Single-Strike, Genesect, Dragapult, Galarian Darmanitan, and Landorus-Incarnate have been unbanned for testing.
author: Rasche
